title: ACT content block — callout
description: Per PRD-102-R5. An informational note. Conformance: Standard. The `level` enum is documented-CLOSED — adding a value is MAJOR per PRD-108-R5(4).

level.description: Documented-closed enum. Adding a value is MAJOR per PRD-108-R5(4).

text.description: Markdown allowed. Consumers MUST treat as content; producers SHOULD NOT include script-bearing HTML.
